title: Crown of Salt - Manifest Matrix Puzzle Board
prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Puzzle visual for "Manifest Matrix". Objective: Cross-reference distributed manifest shards to locate the true relic route.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
